headline: Enliven (ELVN) Gets Higher Price Targets From H.C. Wainwright and Mizuho
summary: Enliven Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:ELVN) is one of the 10 Best Performing Stocks of Q1 2026 to Watch for Q2. On March 26, H.C. Wainwright increased its price target on Enliven Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:ELVN) from $48 to $56 and kept its Buy rating on the stock. This increase in valuation came after Merck & Co., Inc. […]

headline: Pharma, Biotech Giants Ramp Up M&A in Q1 to Boost Pipelines
summary: Eli Lilly and peers like Novartis fuel a 2026 pharma M&A surge, striking billion-dollar deals to expand pipelines, tap AI innovation, and counter patent pressures.

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Merck & Co, Raises Price Target to $135
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Chris Schott   maintains Merck & Co (NYSE:MRK) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $125 to $135.

headline: Zai Lab: Xacduro And ZL-1310 Drive Growth Narrative
